title: AssemblyConstraintSet
description: Defines a deterministic assembly constraint set linking system, condition, substrate, products, rules, and detail output.

constraint_id.description: Unique identifier for this assembly constraint set.

system.description: Reference to the manufacturer system node_id.

condition.description: Reference to the condition node_id that triggers this constraint set.

substrate.description: Reference to the substrate condition node_id, or a substrate type string.

required_products.description: List of product node_ids required for this assembly.

required_rules.description: List of rule node_ids that govern this assembly.

output_detail_reference.description: Reference to the detail node_id that this constraint set produces.

constraint_status.description: Honesty status of this constraint set.

notes.description: Optional notes about this constraint set.
